description_long: This is a modern sectional couch with a right-facing chaise, upholstered in a solid teal fabric. The couch features three seat cushions and a continuous, gently curved backrest that extends into rounded armrests on both sides. The seat cushions are rectangular and appear to be loose, while the backrest is integrated and smoothly contoured. The legs are short, straight, and made of dark wood, providing a slight elevation above the ground. The overall design is sleek and minimal, with no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or accent pillows. This piece would be suitable for contemporary urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern teal sectional couch with a right-facing chaise, smooth upholstery, and dark wooden legs. Features three seat cushions, a continuous curved backrest, and rounded armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, the right-facing chaise, and both rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the chaise and the gentle curve of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the dark wooden legs.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the chaise extension and the smooth, integrated backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose rectangular seat cushions arranged in a row, with an extended chaise cushion on the right; backrest is continuous and integrated, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal fabric with a smooth, untextured appearance and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, exposed legs made of dark wood, slightly tapered and positioned at the corners for support.
attribute_armrest_design: Rounded, medium-height armrests that curve gently from the backrest to the front, fully upholstered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest that is smoothly integrated with the armrests, with no visible divisions or tufting.
